name: SoundCloud download plugin
description: Registers a soundcloud tool that downloads a SoundCloud URL with soundcloud-dl and returns the downloaded file path.

url.description: Track or playlist URL on the Soundcloud

downloadFolder.description: Flag used by soundcloud-dl to choose where media files are stored.

force.description: Allows to overwrite an existing file in the target directory.

socksProxy.description: Passes to the downloader when a SOCKS5 proxy is required. Omit or set null to disable.
